title: 5 UFO Observables explained by Eye-Witnesses!
summary: A compilation of eye-witness accounts explaining the five observables of UFO/UAP performance characteristics. The segment features various witnesses describing instantaneous acceleration, hypersonic velocity, low observability, trans-medium travel, and anti-gravity propulsion.

acronyms.definition: An infrared imaging system that detects heat energy emissions

key_claims.claim: UFOs demonstrate instantaneous acceleration as one of five key observables
A yellow halo was observed at 15 miles away at the witness's altitude
An object traveled 2/3 across a radar scope at a calculated constant velocity of 177,000 mph
UFOs exhibit low observability - visible on FLIR but not visually
UFOs have been reported coming out of the water and flying since World War II
A UFO when running produced its own gravitational field, which is beyond current human technological capability
